title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at UPS India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at UPS India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!
